query:
SELECT 
                id,
                content,
                due_at,
                status,
                frequency,
                current_runs
            FROM reminders
            WHERE user_id = $1
              AND ($2::TIMESTAMPTZ IS NULL OR due_at >= $2)
              AND ($3::TIMESTAMPTZ IS NULL OR due_at <= $3)
              AND ($4::TEXT IS NULL OR status = $4)
            ORDER BY due_at ASC
            LIMIT $5;
